free_text: H.WEIGMANN WITH MEASURED CROSS SECTION DATA ON
.J.BLONS ET AL, PROCEEDINGS OF THE 18TH INTERNATIONAL
WINTER MEETING ON NUCLEAR PHYSICS, BORMIO, 1980.
-THE ASYMMETRIC DEFORMATION OF TH-231 AND TH-233.-
THE C.B.N.M. 4.2 NSEC PULSE WIDTH, 800 HZ.
.432.4 MG OF NP-237 FOR THE MONITOR REACTION.
ONLY THE CROSS SECTION SHAPES ARE MEASURED RELATIVE
TO NP-237. AT 720 KEV EFFECTIVE RESOLUTION OF 1.7
KEV FWHM FOR TH-230, FOR TH-232 AT 1.6 MEV IT WAS
2.3 KEV FWHM. FLIGHT PATHS OF 51 M (TH-230) AND 101 M
XENON AT NORMAL TEMPERATURE AND PRESSURE.
.FIT OF THE CROSS SECTION WITH A MODEL ASSUMING
TWO ALMOST DEGENERATE ROTATIONAL BANDS WITH
.DATA FROM MAGNETIC TAPE SENT BY WEIGMANN.
.DATA TAKEN FROM TAPE SENT BY WEIGMANN.
